particulars.description: A specific equitable charge ove f/h & l/h properties and/or proceeds of sale thereof. Fixed & floating charge over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill, book debts.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company and/or all or any of the other companies named therein to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: F/H property known as land & premises in hall street, west bromwich west midlands described in conveyance dated 5-10-77. floating charge over all moveable plant machinery implements utensils furniture and equipment.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: (A) freehold land on the north side of hall steet, west bromwich. (B) leasehold property situate on the northside of hall street.
